name: agent-team-harness
description: Codex skill wrapper for the local Agent Team Harness CLI.

interface.longDescription: Provides the Agent Team Harness Codex skill. The plugin is intentionally thin: Codex still operates the repo-local agent-team CLI, which owns canonical state, task routing, Claude channel requests, review gates, merge records, leases, proof artifacts, and final verification.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Agent Team Harness to plan or run a Codex-led Claude/Codex teammate workflow.
